The '''''Radiant IX''''' was a [[Consular-class light cruiser/Legends|''Consular''-class space cruiser]].

==History==
The ''Radiant IX'' was once used to transport [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Et Rex]] and [[Alysun Celz]] to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] to be tried before the [[Jedi Council/Legends|Jedi Council]] for falling to the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]. Before the ship arrived, however, a group of [[Mynock/Legends|mynocks]] managed to leech energy from the external electrical couplings causing the ship to lose power and be sucked into the [[Gravity well/Legends|gravity well]] of the [[Hoth system/Legends|Hoth system]]. The crew landed on an [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] known by [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] as the "[[Poison Moon/Legends|Poison Moon]]," where they managed to transmit a distress signal before they were killed by Celz who had somehow managed to escape. Rex, however, managed to escape the ship and befriended some [[Mynock/Legends|mynocks]] on the asteroid's surface before Celz could kill him also.

[[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] were sent to investigate the distress signal and, upon entering the ship, they discovered the dead bodies of the crew as well as the smell of o-zone; evidence they had been killed either by a [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] or [[Force lightning/Legends|Force lightning]]. They discovered Celz behind a door leading from the bridge whom managed to convince them that she was the [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] of the ship and it was in fact Rex who had murdered the crew. Kenobi left Skywalker with Celz as he went to search the surface of the asteroid for Rex.

Kenobi found Rex almost immediately, who explained that he had been framed and that Celz was in fact the killer. Back on board, Celz attempted to convince Anakin to leave without his master unsuccessfully and instead used Force lightning to incapacitate him, revealing herself to be the [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] rather than Rex. Kenobi and Rex arrived just in time to save Anakin, Kenobi attacking with his lightsaber but being hit by Force lightning also while Rex unleashed a pair of mynock's upon her, which fed on her lightning as they would any other electricity.

The Jedi left the ''Radiant IX'' on the "Poison Moon," leaving with their prisoners on board their own ship and heading back to Coruscant.
